comments.author: reviewer1
comments.body: Shouldn't this handle the case where `entry` is undefined? A cache miss would throw here.

reviewThreads.draft: Fixed in `abc1234` — `get()` now returns early on a cache miss instead of dereferencing `entry`.
reviewThreads.draftHumanized: Good catch! You're right that a cache miss would have thrown there. I added an early return so `get()` bails out cleanly when `entry` is undefined — it's in `abc1234`.
